case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. NAKIEA ANDERSON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,982.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, NAKIEA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE. REQUEST FOR A RESET. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-02-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-29-2011 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $60.94) SERVED MAR-18-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, NAKIEA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-02-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, NAKIEA $3,982.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.94 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,042.94, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
